description: Templates for learning design, curriculum visualization, research organization, study planning, and educational frameworks — from K-12 lesson plans to doctoral research boards

templates.name: Lesson Plan Board
templates.description: Structured lesson planning board for designing a single class session with clear learning objectives, a timed activity sequence, required materials, assessment criteria, and differentiation strategies for diverse learners

templates.name: Research Board
templates.description: Comprehensive visual map of a research project from question through literature review, methodology, findings, and implications — designed for academic rigor and clear communication

templates.name: Study Map
templates.description: Student-facing visual map of a topic showing concepts, relationships, resources, and mastery checkpoints — designed to support self-directed learning and review

templates.name: Course Curriculum Board
templates.description: Semester-long or year-long course overview showing weekly topics, cumulative objectives, major assignments, Bloom's progression, and the full arc of the learning journey
